# VibeQuarter

> VibeQuarter is an AI operations agent for clinics. It books and manages
> appointments over WhatsApp and phone/voice in Arabic and English, and runs the
> clinic's front-desk operations 24/7.

## What it does
- AI booking agent: books, reschedules, and cancels appointments over WhatsApp and phone calls.
- Native Arabic (all dialects) and English, with full RTL support.
- Clinic dashboard: services, working hours, appointments, patients, and a live simulator.
- Booking confirmations delivered on WhatsApp via approved message templates.
- PDPL-aware data handling for the Gulf (Saudi Arabia primary).

## Roadmap
- ZATCA-compliant invoicing.
- Patient contact capture and routing patient questions to the doctor.
- Post-visit Google-review requests over WhatsApp.

## Best for
Owner-operated clinics and medical/aesthetic spas in the Gulf that want every
call and message answered and booked automatically.
